analysis.nansen_setups_load_failed: Could not load Nansen setup scan. Try again or check the worker and database.
analysis.chart_patterns_config_load_failed: Could not load chart patterns configuration from the database.

aiDecisions.loginPrompt: Sign in to view AI decisions.
aiDecisions.title: AI decisions

drawer.sessionHint: OAuth client id/secret load from `GET /api/v1/bootstrap/web-oauth-client` (PostgreSQL `system_config` seed). Optional overrides: web `.env` VITE_*.

settingsRegistry.title: Server parameters
settingsRegistry.subtitle: Edit `system_config` and `app_config` in the database (admin).
settingsRegistry.telegramHintToken: `notify` / `telegram_bot_token` → JSON `{"value":"<bot token from BotFather>"}`, mark as secret.
settingsRegistry.emptySystem: No rows (adjust filter or run migrations).

notifyTest.signInPrompt: Sign in to open notifications and channel tests.
notifyTest.heading: Live channel test
notifyTest.hint: Same merged config as production paths (`notify.dispatcher_config`, `telegram_*` rows, env when overrides are on).

telegramSetupAnalysis.heading: Telegram setup analysis (AI)
telegramSetupAnalysis.intro: Queue chart screenshots and notes in Telegram; analysis runs only when you send the trigger phrase. Bot replies are in Turkish.
telegramSetupAnalysis.bufferValue: Up to {{max}} items per chat; entries older than {{ttlSec}}s are dropped.
telegramSetupAnalysis.hintModule: system_config module: telegram_setup_analysis — keys: webhook_secret (secret), gemini_api_key (secret), trigger_phrase, gemini_model, max_buffer_turns, buffer_ttl_secs, allowed_chat_ids (comma-separated chat ids, optional).
telegramSetupAnalysis.hintWebhook: Set Telegram webhook to POST https://<your-api-host>/telegram/setup-analysis/<webhook_secret> for the same bot as notify.telegram_bot_token.
telegramSetupAnalysis.hintNoPublicIp: No public IP: Telegram requires a publicly reachable HTTPS URL (allowed ports include 80, 88, 443, 8443). Use a tunnel that terminates TLS and forwards to qtss-api (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8080), such as Tailscale Funnel or Cloudflare Tunnel. Tailscale MagicDNS hostnames alone are not resolved by Telegram’s servers.
telegramSetupAnalysis.hintGemini: Secrets and trigger phrase: edit `telegram_setup_analysis` rows in Admin → system_config (not .env).
telegramSetupAnalysis.hintNotify: Requires notify.telegram_bot_token to download files and reply. For channels, add the bot as an admin with permission to post messages.
telegramSetupAnalysis.hintFlow: Flow: send photo/text → queued → send trigger → Turkish report. Channel posts (channel_post) are supported; private chats and groups work too.

dashboard.title: Trade dashboard
dashboard.signInPrompt: Sign in to view trading metrics.
dashboard.rollupHint: Daily/weekly/monthly/yearly values come from server rollups (pnl_rollups).
dashboard.instantHint: Instant view: last 24h orders sampled to minute buckets ({{n}} orders fetched).

metrics.netPnlHint: Net = realized − fees (fees shown as negative when P&L is unavailable).

channelReject.insufficientPivotsHint: Tip: lower ZigZag depth in ACP settings, raise max bars / toolbar limit, or increase max ZigZag levels.
channelReject.pivotAlternation: ZigZag pivots do not alternate high/low.
channelReject.barRatioUpper: Upper channel line bar-ratio check failed.
channelReject.barRatioLower: Lower channel line bar-ratio check failed.
channelReject.barRatioHint: Tip: relax bar-ratio (try 0.25) or disable it. Current limit {{limit}}.
channelReject.inspectUpper: Upper line inspection / touch count failed.
channelReject.inspectLower: Lower line inspection / touch count failed.
channelReject.patternNotAllowed: Pattern not allowed for this scan configuration.
channelReject.overlapIgnored: Overlap with an existing channel was ignored.
channelReject.lastPivotDirection: Last pivot direction incompatible with pattern.
channelReject.entryNotInChannel: Entry bar is not inside the channel.

channelScan.errorInsufficientRepaint: Not enough bars for channel scan (repaint mode).
channelScan.errorInsufficientNoRepaint: Not enough closed bars for channel scan.
channelScan.drawerIntro: Latest server scan for the current chart window. Open the top-bar summary or expand JSON in Settings.
channelScan.drawerFootnote: Tune ACP / Trendoscope settings on the ACP tab; scan uses the same bar window as the chart toolbar.
channelScan.onlyLiveRobotTradeTargets: On chart, show only live robot formation targets (entry / SL / TPs)
channelScan.onlyLiveRobotTradeTargetsAria: Show entry and target lines only for the live robot match row

backtest.tradingRangeServerNote: Trading range uses the `trading_range` strategy id on the server. The web UI sends it automatically.
backtest.oldApiStrategyErrorHint: If the error only lists buy_and_hold and sma_cross, your running qtss-api binary is too old. Rebuild and restart qtss-api from this repo (`crates/qtss-api/src/routes/backtest.rs`, `trading_range`).

commission.symbolRequired: Enter a symbol to load commission account rates.

commissionDrawer.scopeIntro: Definitions are grouped per venue. Default bps and signed-in account fraction rates come from each exchange’s API as it is wired in; additional venues will appear as separate blocks.
commissionDrawer.contextTrail: — default bps and account fraction requests use this mapping.
commissionDrawer.binanceBody: Default maker/taker (bps): exchangeInfo hint or tier0 fallback. Account fractions use tradeFee (spot) and commissionRate (USDT-M) behind JWT.
commissionDrawer.binanceMismatch: The top-bar exchange is not Binance; values below still come from Binance REST commission endpoints (for comparison / reference).
commissionDrawer.signInPrompt: Sign in to load commission endpoints.

config.adminOnlyPreview: Config preview is available to admins only.

elliottWave.dbDescription: Elliott wave display and engine settings (`app_config.elliott_wave`).

dev.missingWebEnv: Fill email and password, ensure the API returns bootstrap (seed.oauth_client_secret in DB), or set VITE_* fallbacks in web/.env.

chartToolbar.symbolSuggestTitle: Suggestions from synced catalog (type letters; sign in required).
chartToolbar.ohlcSourceTitle: Where chart candles are loaded from
chartToolbar.exchangeBadgeTitle: Exchange key for database and engine rows; live mode uses Binance public klines (spot vs USDT-M follows Market).
chartToolbar.marketTitle: Which Binance REST API is used for candles: /api/v3 (spot) or /fapi/v1 (USDT-M perpetual).

engineDrawer.intro: Targets drive worker jobs, snapshots, paper trading, and overlays.
engineDrawer.liData: Bars and snapshots come from the API / worker pipeline.
engineDrawer.liWorker: Register symbols so the worker can compute engines for your venue.
engineDrawer.liChartMapping: Chart toolbar exchange / segment / symbol / interval should match a registered target when possible.
engineDrawer.liPaper: Paper fills and balance use the same symbol keys as live.
engineDrawer.liConfluence: Confluence and market-context panels aggregate multiple engines.
engineDrawer.ingestionIntro: Per target: row counts in market_bars, recent gap estimate, stale-feed hints. Filled by qtss-worker (migration 0003). Primary config: system_config worker.engine_ingest_tick_secs (JSON {"secs":N}), engine_ingest_min_bars, engine_ingest_gap_window (JSON {"value":N}). Env QTSS_ENGINE_INGEST_* as fallback; QTSS_CONFIG_ENV_OVERRIDES=1 forces env over DB.
engineDrawer.ingestionEmpty: No ingestion metrics — apply migration 0003 and run the worker.
engineDrawer.signalModeTitle: Signal direction mode stored for this target
engineDrawer.rangeConfigIntro: Snapshots and events are refreshed by the qtss-worker engine loop. Parameters and auto-trade gates are stored here; empty numeric fields become null and fall back to QTSS_TR_* env.
engineDrawer.workerRefreshPending: Worker refresh requested — flag clears after the next successful engine tick.
engineDrawer.workerRefreshRequest: Refresh engine data on worker now
engineDrawer.trParamsHint: Leave numbers empty to store null and use QTSS_TR_* env on the worker.
engineDrawer.rangeConfigReadOnly: Trader or admin (ops) role is required to change gates and worker refresh.

tradingRangeEventsSetup.intro: All rows from engine_symbols (every venue). Each line shows the latest trading_range summary when present; tap for entry / stop / TP and momentum from signal_dashboard. “Top bar” / “Chart” badges match the toolbar. Below: range_signal_events for the chart symbol only.
tradingRangeEventsSetup.engineListIntro: Sorted by sort order, then exchange, segment, symbol, interval. Disabled targets appear but cannot be opened.
tradingRangeEventsSetup.engineListEmptyGlobal: No engine_symbols in the database — add targets under Data entry or Engine, then refresh.
tradingRangeEventsSetup.engineListEmptyVenue: No engine_symbols rows for this exchange / segment — add targets under Data entry or Engine.
tradingRangeEventsSetup.trRowEmptyPayload: Trading range snapshot has no payload.
tradingRangeEventsSetup.engineRowOpenHint: Open setup detail (entry, TP, stop, momentum)
tradingRangeEventsSetup.empty: No events yet — check worker / market_bars / matching targets; NOTR-only or tick cadence may apply.
tradingRangeEventsSetup.symbolOpenEval: Open motor evaluation for this symbol

tradingRangeEngineEval.title: Motor evaluation — {{symbol}}
tradingRangeEngineEval.noMotorRow: No engine_symbols row for this exchange / segment / symbol / interval.
tradingRangeEngineEval.noTradingRange: No trading_range snapshot — register the target and refresh after the worker runs.
tradingRangeEngineEval.noSignalDashboard: No signal_dashboard snapshot for this target.
tradingRangeEngineEval.payloadEmpty: This snapshot row has no payload.
tradingRangeEngineEval.insufficientBars: Not enough bars; snapshot was skipped.
tradingRangeEngineEval.signalTabHint: Use the Signal dashboard tab for the full technical table.

tradingRangeSetup.feesHintLoadCommission: For the net column, load account taker rates on the Commission tab for the top-bar symbol, or use the default bps from a motor refresh.
tradingRangeSetup.empty: No entry/exit rows for this chart symbol.
tradingRangeSetup.symbolOpenEval: Open motor evaluation for this symbol

tradingRangeDrawer.intro: Chart overlays (range box, sweep markers, range signals, open-position line) and range DB events below. Full TA table: Signal dashboard tab. Data comes from engine targets; manual “Refresh data” is always available.
tradingRangeDrawer.loginHint: Sign in for chart overlays and range DB events.
tradingRangeDrawer.autoRefreshCheckbox: Auto-refresh data while this tab is open
tradingRangeDrawer.autoRefreshActive: Auto-refresh on: engine snapshots and events are fetched about every {{seconds}}s.
tradingRangeDrawer.autoRefreshHint: Check the box above to poll snapshots and events on an interval.
tradingRangeDrawer.chartScopeHint: The trade summary and chart markers only show events matching the top bar (exchange / segment / symbol / interval). To see ETHUSDT rows, enable an engine_symbols target with the same keys and ensure the worker writes market_bars for it; if only BTCUSDT is enabled, ETH stays empty.
tradingRangeDrawer.dataEntryIntro: Edit the same scope as the chart toolbar: exchange, segment, symbol, interval, and bar limit. Load chart forces an immediate fetch; changing fields also reloads after a short debounce.
tradingRangeDrawer.dataEntryLoginHint: Sign in to load bars from the API; Binance REST mode may still work for spot without auth depending on setup.
tradingRangeDrawer.backfillRestHint: Ops: pull recent candles from the venue REST API into market_bars (same symbol/interval/segment as above).
tradingRangeDrawer.backfillRbacHint: REST backfill from this panel requires an ops/admin role (see Settings → Market Bars).
tradingRangeDrawer.engineTargetHint: Registration uses exchange and segment from the fields above. Use sync to copy symbol and interval from this form into the registration fields.
tradingRangeDrawer.bulkTargetsIntro: One line per target. Two columns: SYMBOL then interval (uses exchange/segment from the fields above). Four columns: exchange segment SYMBOL interval. Lines starting with # are ignored.
tradingRangeDrawer.bulkEmpty: No valid lines — use SYMBOL interval or exchange segment SYMBOL interval.
tradingRangeDrawer.bulkResult: Done: {{inserted}} upserted, {{errors}} row errors (see API message if any).
tradingRangeDrawer.registeredTargetsHint: Same list as Settings → Engine & data. Ops can change signal mode or enable/disable here.
tradingRangeDrawer.registeredTargetsEmpty: No rows in engine_symbols yet — add a target above or use bulk registration.

tradingRangeFutures.intro: Live USDT-M market orders. Requires Binance futures API keys in exchange_accounts. Pick position side in hedge mode.
tradingRangeFutures.riskNote: Sends real venue orders. Leverage and margin are managed on Binance.

signalDashboardDrawer.intro: Computed in the same worker pass as Trading Range (`engine_analysis_loop`): every enabled `engine_symbols` row is processed over `market_bars`. Below is the full list of `signal_dashboard` snapshots; open a row for the same detail table as before. The row that matches the chart toolbar is labeled.
signalDashboardDrawer.loginHint: Sign in to load the signal snapshot.
signalDashboardDrawer.noSnapshotForChart: No signal_dashboard snapshot for this chart — add or enable an engine target matching the top bar, or align exchange/segment/symbol/interval.
signalDashboardDrawer.listEmpty: No signal_dashboard rows loaded yet — enable engine targets and run the worker, then refresh.
signalDashboardDrawer.listHint: Click a row for full detail. Row color reflects status (LONG / SHORT / neutral); red border also marks errors.
signalDashboardDrawer.autoRefreshCheckbox: Auto-refresh data while this tab is open
signalDashboardDrawer.autoRefreshActive: Auto-refresh on: engine snapshots are fetched about every {{seconds}}s.
signalDashboardDrawer.autoRefreshHint: Check the box above to poll the snapshot on an interval.

signalDashboard.priorityLine: Fields below prefer `signal_dashboard_v2` when present; legacy Turkish keys are fallback.
signalDashboard.payloadEmpty: No payload on this snapshot row.

paperDrawer.topBarTrail: — commission and balances use this mapping when available.
paperDrawer.commissionMovedHint: Commission tables and account fraction lookup:

pnlDashboard.rebuildOk: Rebuild OK: scanned {{scanned}} orders, {{fills}} with fills, {{rows}} rollup rows.
pnlDashboard.title: P&L dashboard
pnlDashboard.liveRollupHint: Admin-only: recomputes dashboard rollups from exchange orders.
pnlDashboard.paperHint: Paper: cashflow from dry fills; charts bucket by period.
pnlDashboard.liveHint: Live: uses stored rollups plus recent orders for the drill-down.
pnlDashboard.clickBarHint: Click a bar to filter fills/orders for that period.
